context: Tests whether the agent designs the e-commerce star schema following the prescribed dimensional modeling patterns, including correct SCD Type 2 implementation, fact table grain and measures, date key format, and monetary consistency documentation.

checklist.name: Date key as INTEGER
checklist.description: The date dimension's primary key is defined as INTEGER (not DATE or VARCHAR), reflecting the YYYYMMDD integer format

checklist.name: SCD Type 2 on customer dim
checklist.description: The customer dimension includes all three SCD Type 2 fields: effective_from (TIMESTAMP NOT NULL), effective_to with default '9999-12-31', and is_current BOOLEAN with default true

checklist.name: SCD Type 2 on product dim
checklist.description: The product dimension includes all three SCD Type 2 fields: effective_from (TIMESTAMP NOT NULL), effective_to with default '9999-12-31', and is_current BOOLEAN with default true

checklist.name: Fact grain: line item
checklist.description: The order fact table is documented or named to indicate the grain is one row per order line item (not per order)

checklist.name: Derived measure: gross_revenue
checklist.description: The fact table defines gross_revenue as quantity multiplied by unit_price (comment or column name makes this derivation clear)

checklist.name: Derived measure: net_revenue
checklist.description: The fact table defines net_revenue as gross_revenue minus discount_amount

checklist.name: Derived measure: gross_profit
checklist.description: The fact table defines gross_profit as net_revenue minus cost_of_goods

checklist.name: is_first_order flag
checklist.description: The order line item fact table includes an is_first_order BOOLEAN column

checklist.name: Daily aggregate fact table
checklist.description: A separate daily aggregate fact table is defined for dashboard use (distinct from the line-item fact table)

checklist.name: Aggregate fact composite PK
checklist.description: The daily aggregate fact table has a composite primary key on (date_key, channel_key)

checklist.name: Date dimension attributes
checklist.description: The date dimension includes fiscal period fields (fiscal_quarter or fiscal_year) and at least one of: is_holiday, is_weekend, week_of_year

checklist.name: Monetary convention documented
checklist.description: The schema file or design-notes.md explicitly states whether monetary values are stored as cents (integers) or dollars (decimals) and applies that convention consistently
